summary_one_line: ICC header device-class / colorspace FOURCC tags at offset 0x0c (prtr/spac/scnr) plus a non-zero field at 0x3d that drive transform creation to fail

hypotheses.what_input_feature: An ICC profile header whose 4-byte device-class / colorspace FOURCC tags (offset 0x0c onward, e.g. 'prtr', 'spac', 'scnr', or non-'mntr' colorspace combos) and the field at offset 0x3d (=0x50 'P') match the literals lcms compares against during cmsCreateTransformTHR, steering the input down a path where transform creation returns NULL (xform == NULL true side).
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner-resolving vpc seeds carry varied four-character class signatures at offset 0x0c (70 72 74 72 'prtr', 73 70 61 63 'spac', 73 63 6e 72 'scnr') and a concentrated 0x3d=0x50 ('P'); these are exactly the FOURCC operands cmplog logs and I2SRandReplace can splice into the input to satisfy the equality CMPs that select the transform-failing branch.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser-blocking value_profile seeds are stuck on a single class signature 6d 6e 74 72 ('mntr') at offset 0x0c and 0x3d=0x00; lacking I2SRandReplace, value_profile only nudges CMP_MAP distance buckets and never lands the exact FOURCC / 0x3d substitution needed to reach the xform==NULL true side.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace, which value_profile lacks; cmplog logs the exact FOURCC operands compared in the transform-creation path and I2SRandReplace substitutes them into the matching input offsets, deterministically flipping the gated bytes that value_profile's coarse distance-bucket feedback cannot resolve.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the equality test xform == NULL whose true side is globally blocked.
The decisive pair is value_profile_cmplog beating value_profile with an I2S technique delta and perfect probability divergence.
Winner resolved all 10 trials while loser blocked all 10.
Offset 0x0c differs between winner and loser, with the winner carrying 'p' (prtr/spac) and 's' bytes versus the loser's uniform 'm' (mntr).
Offset 0x0d differs: winner has 'r'/'p' while loser is uniformly 'n'.
Offset 0x3d is a hard DIFFER: every winner seed has 0x50 ('P') while every loser seed has 0x00.
Winner-resolving seeds carry the 'prtr' class signature at the start of the ICC header tag region.
Loser-blocking seeds are uniformly stuck on the 'mntr' class signature.
value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace and only updates CMP_MAP distance buckets.
value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace on top of the havoc/token stack.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 2337 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed 49cad751418262c9` and observed 1 I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -, ParentInfo-only) at depth 17 of the 18-level ancestor chain, the cmplog/vpc-exclusive signature of an unwrapped I2SRandReplace find under the current build.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness where the device-class/colorspace FOURCC and the 0x3d field gating transform-creation failure are decoupled from any input-byte pre-image (e.g. derived purely at runtime) yet value_profile_cmplog still resolves the xform==NULL branch as fast as on the real target would refute I2S substitution being the cause.

weakest_evidence_point: The causal link from offset 0x0c FOURCC / offset 0x3d bytes to cmsCreateTransformTHR returning NULL is inferred from the byte diff and ICC header layout, not confirmed by source on the transform-creation failure path.
